Who I Am
Background & Expertise

I started working at 18 years old — warehouse, retail, branch management, call centers — building operational instincts from the ground up while completing my Engineering degree.

Today I oversee digital operations across two automotive e-commerce platforms at Al Zafer Investment Group — managing 30,000+ active items, 2,000+ vehicle applications, B2B wholesale development, and full Odoo ERP operations.

I attended Automechanika Dubai 2024 as VIP, earned multiple Bosch certifications, led JoPart to the Valvoline Top Online Seller Award, and volunteered 65+ hours as a youth trainer with GAME Jordan.

I don't just run operations — I build the systems that make operations run: SOPs, KPIs, data architecture, pricing strategy, and brand content.

E-Commerce & Odoo Operations95%
Inventory & Supply Chain92%
Data Management & QA90%

Career History
Professional Experience
2025 — Present
Digital Project & Data Supervisor
AutoExcellence (aeparts.jo & jopart.com) — Al Zafer Investment Group
  • Overseeing digital operations across two automotive platforms — aeparts.jo (B2B) and jopart.com (B2C/Odoo)
  • Managing 30,000+ active items: descriptions, images, OE references, vehicle fitment (2,000+ applications)
  • Leading B2B platform development: customer onboarding, pricing structure, and search behavior insights
  • Developing SOPs for item registration, purchasing data entry, and data team workflows
Jan 2025 — 2025
Operations Supervisor
JoPart — Al Zafer Investment Group (Authorized Bosch Agent)
  • Reduced inventory from 150,000 JOD to 95,000 JOD through demand-driven purchasing
  • Grew gross profit margin from 39% to 42% via SKU rationalization and B2B channel management
  • Designed SOPs for all departments; built KPI and employee evaluation frameworks
  • Led Valvoline Top Online Seller recognition — received award at official Valvoline ceremony
  • Organized outdoor vehicle inspection event; produced brand ambassador videos on Instagram

JoPart — Al Zafer Investment Group

  • Built data quality checker, pricing audit, B2B performance reports, and operational action plans
  • Classified slow/fast-moving SKUs; improved cash flow and reduced dead stock

al-Joudeh Engineering Consultation — Amman, Jordan

Live Platform
What I Built — In Action

Real screenshots from the Odoo-based e-commerce platform I built and manage daily.

Odoo E-Commerce • jopart.com — Click to Visit
Vehicle-Driven Product Search
Custom vehicle selector allowing customers to find perfectly matched parts by brand, model, engine size, and year — built on Odoo with 2,000+ vehicle applications.
Odoo Backend • Vehicle Fitment Data
Product-to-Vehicle Data Architecture
Each vehicle linked to compatible parts with engine code, TecDoc reference, fuel type, and SKU mapping — 30,000+ items structured and validated.
Odoo Sales • Custom Dashboard
Custom Order Management View
Built a custom sales order view showing service type, delivery status, sales source, and area — giving real-time operational visibility across all channels.
Odoo Website • Product Page Design
Structured Product Content
Designed product pages with full descriptions, features, usage instructions, origin, SKU, and compatibility data — built for trust and conversion.
